rules.name: allow-read-workspace
rules.reason: workspace reads are allowed with receipts

rules.name: allow-compile-environment
rules.reason: environment compilation is read-only projection plus receipts

rules.name: allow-plan-speed
rules.reason: operable speed planning is read-only architecture projection

rules.name: allow-render-goal-surface
rules.reason: goal surface rendering is local read-only inspection

rules.name: allow-scan-v-project-ecosystem
rules.reason: ecosystem scans read local V project manifests and git summaries

rules.name: allow-import-v-project-ecosystem
rules.reason: ecosystem import writes a local registry under Veloclaw state

rules.name: allow-plan-v-project-integrations
rules.reason: integration planning is a local architecture projection

rules.name: allow-scan-skillmesh
rules.reason: skill mesh scans read local versioned skill manifests

rules.name: allow-import-skillmesh
rules.reason: skill mesh import writes a local registry under Veloclaw state

rules.name: allow-plan-skillmesh
rules.reason: skill mesh planning is a local adapter projection

rules.name: allow-plan-autonomy
rules.reason: autonomy planning is read-only token economy projection

rules.name: allow-observe-online-upstream
rules.reason: online upstream radar is a curated read-only provenance projection

rules.name: allow-adapt-upstream-roadmap
rules.reason: upstream adaptation planning is non-executing roadmap projection

rules.name: allow-plan-permanent-improvement
rules.reason: permanent improvement planning is a read-only control contract

rules.name: allow-plan-spaceship-internal-deploy
rules.reason: Spaceship internal deployment planning is non-public and non-mutating

rules.name: allow-plan-common-libraries
rules.reason: common library wave planning is read-only architecture projection

rules.name: allow-plan-vimport-capabilities
rules.reason: VImport capability planning is read-only architecture projection

rules.name: allow-plan-vimport-common-bridges
rules.reason: VImport/common bridge planning is read-only architecture projection

rules.name: allow-plan-vimport-activation
rules.reason: VImport activation planning is a capsule-only non-executing promotion queue

rules.name: allow-propose-capsule
rules.reason: capsule proposals are non-mutating

rules.name: allow-import-waiba-eskill
rules.reason: WAIBA import is read-only registration of the trusted local automation runtime

rules.name: allow-read-eskill-registry
rules.reason: external skill registry reads are non-mutating

rules.name: allow-propose-eskill-manifest
rules.reason: ESkill manifests are non-executing capability contracts

rules.name: allow-verify-eskill-manifest
rules.reason: ESkill manifest verification is read-only

rules.name: ask-write-workspace
rules.reason: workspace writes require operator approval

rules.name: ask-run-workspace
rules.reason: local command execution needs approval

rules.name: ask-waiba-debug-run
rules.reason: WAIBA debug runs can execute local automation and need approval

rules.name: quarantine-waiba-online-run
rules.reason: WAIBA online automation is quarantined until target/session policy is reviewed

rules.name: ask-waiba-browser-evidence
rules.reason: browser evidence can contain private page or credential-adjacent data

rules.name: block-skill-activation
rules.reason: skills cannot self-activate

rules.name: block-production
rules.reason: production scope is blocked by default

rules.name: quarantine-secret-network
rules.reason: network sends are quarantined until a channel policy exists
